subject: Re: gain_reference for polishing
body:
Hi Zhenyu,

the transformed.mrc file incorporates all selected transforms (flip X/Y, 
transpose) as Relion doesn't support them. In practice, polishing without 
(or even with a wrong) gain reference is unlikely to affect resolution.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Friday, July 10, 2020 at 1:20:12 AM UTC+2, Zhenyu Tan wrote:
>
> Hi,
> I am a little confused about the using warp results for particle 
> polishing. 
> For the gain_reference, warp will generate a transformed.mrc file, should 
> I use this for the particle polishing or the original gain_reference file? 
> Thanks for you help
> Zhenyu 
>
